description: Curated POLE exonuclease domain mutation (EDM) list for endometrial cancer molecular subtyping

exonuclease_domain.note: Mutations outside this domain are NOT classified as POLEmut

tier1.description: Established pathogenic hotspots with strong evidence

tier2.description: Additional confirmed pathogenic variants from León-Castillo et al. scoring system

references: León-Castillo et al. 2020 J Pathol - Interpretation of somatic POLE mutations in endometrial carcinoma
WHO Classification of Female Genital Tumours, 5th edition (2020)
